description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish that runs on push to the master branch and allows manual triggering from the Actions tab. Use a single ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository, sets up environment variables, logs in to Docker Hub, sets up QEMU for multi-platform support, creates a buildx worker node, and builds a Docker image for arm64 and amd64 architectures using a specified Dockerfile and pushing it to Docker Hub.
